deep_dive.title: RH+: Row-Hit-Optimized Scheduling for PIM-based LLM Inference
deep_dive.abstract: Large language model inference on processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures promises to break the memory wall by performing multiply-accumulate (MAC) operations directly within HBM3 DRAM banks. Prior work identifies the power constraint timing parameter nCCDAB as the primary performance bottleneck and optimizes scheduling accordingly. We demonstrate that for GEMV operations that dominate autoregressive decoding, the DRAM row cycle time (nRC) is 10 to 11 times larger than nCCDAB. Consequently, nCCDAB is entirely masked, rendering prior nCCDAB-focused optimizations ineffective for these workloads. The root cause is inherited host-centric address interleaving, which forces every all-bank MAC command into a different DRAM row. We propose RH+ scheduling, a simple stride change that keeps 32 consecutive MAC operations within the same row. Cycle-accurate simulation across four LLM workloads shows that RH+ delivers 8-12x speedup, over 74% energy reduction, and up to 52x EDP improvement.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Optimizes scheduling for PIM-based LLM inference, directly addressing processing-in-memory systems
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 针对基于PIM的大语言模型推理优化调度，直接涉及处理中内存系统
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 针对基于PIM的大语言模型推理优化调度，直接涉及处理中内存系统
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 针对基于PIM的大语言模型推理优化调度，直接涉及处理中内存系统
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes RH+ scheduling to optimize row hits in PIM for LLM inference, showing that nCCDAB-focused optimizations are ineffective for GEMV due to nRC dominance, achieving improved performance.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对大语言模型推理在PIM架构中的内存墙问题，本文发现DRAM行周期时间nRC是主要瓶颈，而之前针对nCCDAB的优化无效。提出RH+调度策略，通过优化行命中率来提升GEMV操作的性能。实验表明，RH+调度显著减少了行冲突，加速了LLM的decoding阶段。这项工作为PIM系统在实际LLM工作负载中的高效调度提供了关键洞察。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对大语言模型推理在PIM架构中的内存墙问题，本文发现DRAM行周期时间nRC是主要瓶颈，而之前针对nCCDAB的优化无效。提出RH+调度策略，通过优化行命中率来提升GEMV操作的性能。实验表明，RH+调度显著减少了行冲突，加速了LLM的decoding阶段。这项工作为PIM系统在实际LLM工作负载中的高效调度提供了关键洞察。

deep_dive.title: Modeling, Optimizing and Exploring Multi-Die FPGA Routing Architectures
deep_dive.abstract: Die stacking has enabled 2.5D FPGAs by integrating multiple active dice on a passive silicon interposer for improved yield and capacity, and paved the way for 3D architectures that stack active dice directly atop one another. In these multi-die devices, the unique electrical and physical characteristics of the underlying die-stacking technology impose limitations on inter-die connection density and latency, necessitating a bespoke inter-die routing architecture. However, the absence of accurate and versatile modeling tools has left most questions about how to best design the inter-die routing architecture unanswered.   To address this gap, we enhance the open-source FPGA CAD tool VTR to flexibly model a wide range of multi-die routing architectures, and augment VPR's placement and routing engines to improve optimization for both 2.5D and 3D FPGAs. We perform HSPICE-based circuit modeling of inter-die connections for active dice using a 7 nm process node and a 45 nm silicon interposer across several die-crossing technologies. Using this enhanced framework, we conduct a detailed design space exploration of inter-die routing architecture in 2.5D and 3D FPGAs, characterizing the impact of die-crossing technology, inter-die connection count, fan-in/fan-out, and interposer wire length on critical path delay (CPD), wirelength, area, and routability.   Our results show that with suitable inter-die routing architectures, 2.5D and 3D FPGAs can increase capacity without significant routability or delay penalties. Specifically, 3D FPGAs achieve up to 14% wirelength reduction and 6% CPD improvement over 2D devices, and remain routable even with existing $10\,μ$m pitch technologies, while 2.5D FPGAs incur only a 2% wirelength and 4% CPD overhead at 32% inter-die connectivity. All extensions are open source and integrated with the VTR master branch.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: modeling and optimization of multi-die FPGA routing architectures for 3D ICs
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向3D集成电路的多裸片FPGA路由架构建模与优化
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向3D集成电路的多裸片FPGA路由架构建模与优化
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向3D集成电路的多裸片FPGA路由架构建模与优化
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Extends open-source FPGA CAD tool VTR to model multi-die routing architectures, enabling design space exploration for 2.5D/3D FPGAs.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对多裸片FPGA中Die间路由架构设计工具缺失的问题，本文扩展了开源VTR工具，使其能够灵活建模多种多裸片路由架构。通过实验探索不同Die堆叠技术对互连密度和延迟的影响，为2.5D/3D FPGA的设计提供了优化指导。该工作填补了建模工具空白，促进了三维集成电路设计空间的有效探索。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对多裸片FPGA中Die间路由架构设计工具缺失的问题，本文扩展了开源VTR工具，使其能够灵活建模多种多裸片路由架构。通过实验探索不同Die堆叠技术对互连密度和延迟的影响，为2.5D/3D FPGA的设计提供了优化指导。该工作填补了建模工具空白，促进了三维集成电路设计空间的有效探索。
